text: Walking through these clean, bright corridors and then entering this colorful, idea-filled space, I feel a quiet anticipation. The glass walls suggest openness and transparency, yet also a sense of threshold—an entry between the known and the unknown. Now, surrounded by the R+D displays, I am stimulated by the interplay of innovation and inquiry. I feel both small and curious in the presence of so much creative energy, wondering how human thought will shape what comes next.
